faqs.a: KimuX is an AI-driven brokerage & affiliate marketing platform that connects businesses with growth opportunities through intelligent campaign management, CRM tools, and data-driven insights. We help you scale faster with automated workflows and real-time analytics.

KimuX offers: 🎯 Campaign Management, 📊 AI-Powered Analytics, 💼 B2B Brokerage, 🛍️ B2C Marketplace, 💰 Affiliate Hub, 🤖 AI Dashboard, ⛓️ Blockchain Integration, 💳 Fintech Tools, 📈 Commerce Intelligence, and 👨‍💻 Developer API.

We offer flexible pricing plans starting from $99/month for startups, $499/month for growing businesses, and custom enterprise plans. All plans include a 14-day free trial with no credit card required.
Click the 'Sign Up' button in the top right corner, fill in your details, and you'll be ready to go in under 2 minutes! We'll send you a confirmation email with next steps.

faqs.q: How do I create my first campaign?
faqs.a: Go to Campaigns → New, pick your objective (awareness, conversions, or engagement), connect an ad account, set your budget and schedule, then launch! Our AI will optimize targeting automatically.

faqs.q: Can I track campaign performance in real-time?
faqs.a: Absolutely! Your campaign dashboard updates every 60 seconds with metrics like impressions, clicks, conversions, ROI, and more. Set up custom alerts to get notified of important changes.

faqs.q: What ad platforms do you support?
faqs.a: We integrate with Google Ads, Facebook Ads, Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok, Twitter, and more. Connect multiple accounts and manage everything from one dashboard.

faqs.q: How does the CRM help manage leads?
faqs.a: Our CRM automatically captures leads from all sources, scores them with AI, assigns them to your pipeline stages, and sends smart follow-up reminders. You can also track every interaction and note.
Yes! Go to CRM → Import and upload a CSV file with your contacts. We support standard formats and can map custom fields during import.

faqs.q: Does the CRM integrate with email?
faqs.a: Yes! Connect Gmail, Outlook, or any SMTP provider. Send emails directly from the CRM, track opens and clicks, and sync all conversations automatically.
Affiliates earn commissions on completed sales or actions. Payouts are processed monthly via PayPal, Stripe, or bank transfer. You can set custom commission rates and track earnings in real-time.
The default minimum payout is $100, but you can adjust it in Settings → Payouts. Lower thresholds may incur additional processing fees.

faqs.q: When do I receive my payout?
faqs.a: Payouts are processed on the 5th of each month for the previous month's earnings. Bank transfers take 3-5 business days, PayPal is instant.
Go to Settings → Integrations, select the service you want to connect (Slack, Zapier, Shopify, etc.), and click 'Connect'. Follow the OAuth flow to authorize access.
Yes! Click 'Customize' in the top right of any dashboard to add/remove widgets, change layouts, and set default filters. Your preferences are saved automatically.

faqs.q: How do I manage team permissions?
faqs.a: Go to Settings → Team, invite members by email, and assign roles (Admin, Manager, Viewer). Each role has different access levels to features and data.

faqs.q: How do I upgrade my plan?
faqs.a: Go to Settings → Billing and click 'Upgrade Plan'. Choose your new tier and enter payment details. The upgrade is instant and you'll only pay the prorated difference.
Yes, you can cancel anytime from Settings → Billing. Your plan remains active until the end of the billing period, and you can export all your data before leaving.
Yes! Our REST API is fully documented at https://api.KimuX.com/docs. Get your API key from Settings → Developer to start making requests.
Standard plans get 1000 requests/hour, Pro plans get 5000 requests/hour, and Enterprise plans get unlimited API access with dedicated support.
You can chat with me anytime, email support@KimuX.com, or schedule a call with our team. Enterprise customers get dedicated Slack support.

Our AI Dashboard provides predictive analytics, automated insights, anomaly detection, smart recommendations, and natural language query support. It learns from your data to provide increasingly accurate predictions.
We support smart contract deployment, crypto payments, NFT marketplace features, and transparent transaction tracking on Ethereum, Polygon, and Solana networks.
